listing_title: CIE 0580 C1 Number (Core) Section Bundle
subtitle: Early-Bird Presale | Core | Section Bundle
short_description: Early-bird presale for CIE 0580 Number (Core). Includes approx. 16 subtopics (Core) with structured section-level worksheet and answer support.
description_markdown:
This is the early-bird presale for **CIE 0580 C1 Number (Core)** (Core), inside the Number unit.

### What this section covers
- Approx. **16 subtopics** focused on one syllabus section
- Designed for section-by-section exam preparation
- Aligned with Kahoot usage and worksheet progression

### What you receive now (presale stage)
- Presale entitlement confirmation
- Early-bird price lock
- Release updates for this section bundle

### What you receive on release (April 30, 2026)
- Section worksheet pack
- Section answer and worked support
- Section-focused Kahoot companion alignment

### Early-bird window
- Early-bird ends: **March 31, 2026**
- Official release: **April 30, 2026**

### Upgrade path
- Start here at section level (L2)
- Upgrade to full unit bundle (L3) when ready

### Bonus and retention
- Includes themed past-paper bonus, free bilingual vocabulary cards, and bilingual support upgrade coupons.
- Need-based bilingual support path is available after purchase (not review-gated).

### Policy notes
- Presale terms are listed in the product page and project terms PDF.
- Dates are absolute and promises follow the listed release schedule.
